text:
REGIME — Risk-on selective; semis and metals led, software and healthcare crushed.

INDICES — VIX 19.2, up intraday (VIXY +1.19%). QQQ +0.14%, SPY -0.07%, IWM -0.25%, DIA -0.55%; large caps beat small caps today. USO fell -1.69%, the sharpest cross-asset move on the session.

SECTORS — XLB +0.56%, XLK +0.39%, XLRE +0.21%, XLY +0.13%, XLC -0.28%, XLI -0.39%, XLU -0.40%, XLE -0.68%, XLF -1.09%, XLP -1.29%, XLV -1.35%. Top industries: WGMI +2.01%, CPER +1.87%. Bottom industries: CIBR -3.71%, WCLD -5.01%.

THE 7s — Semi +2.73%, Buildout +1.37%, New Metals +1.35%, Old Metals +1.31%, Fab +1.02%, Power +0.03%, Housing -0.13%, Freight -0.14%, New Staples -0.18%, Bank -0.24%, Industrial -0.40%, Energy -0.57%, Medtech -0.84%, Old Staples -0.95%, Toll Road -1.39%, Health -1.44%, Defense -1.71%, Insurance -2.09%, Cloud -2.11%, Software -3.59%. Strongest ticker in Semi basket: SMH +1.53%. Weakest in Software: NET -13.50%.

FED & LIQUIDITY — Next FOMC Apr 29; CME holds 100% probability of hold, zero cut or hike. Fed stance: 6 hawks (Cook, Hammack, Kashkari, Logan, Barkin, Goolsbee), 5 neutral, 4 doves. USD Liquidity Stress composite 56/100 (Elevated); most-stressed component is SOFR Dispersion and Reserve Scarcity, both at the 80th percentile. TGA dropped $99.3B; ON-RRP near zero at $0.4B.

SIGNALS — Fear & Greed 62.1, Greed. Top movers: NET -13.50% (Software), NOW -7.58% (Software), INTU -2.97% (Software). 20d momentum best sector: XLB +5.05%; worst: XLC -0.83%. Best basket 20d: Semi +18.97%; worst: Software -17.03%. NET's -13.50% collapse on 3.5x volume tied to software sector earnings pressure and cloud spending concerns.

WATCH — NET today -13.50%, 3.5x volume; gap-down magnitude warrants watching for dead-cat bounce or continued distribution. NOW -7.58%, 3.6x volume; watch for XLK sympathy drag. PLTR -1.86%, 2.6x volume; defense-adjacent name breaking near-term momentum amid Defense 7 -1.71%.
